outlets.name: CNN
outlets.headline: Trump warns 'entire country' could be taken out in one night as deadline looms
outlets.summary: Trump says 'a whole civilization will die tonight.' Not concerned about war crimes. Iran rejected ceasefire. Deadline 8PM ET.

outlets.name: Washington Post
outlets.headline: Trump brushes off war crime concerns as he repeats threat to Iran's infrastructure
outlets.summary: 100+ international law experts warn of war crimes. Guterres calls civilian infrastructure strikes unlawful.

outlets.name: Fox News
outlets.headline: Trump warns Iran to reopen Hormuz or face sweeping strikes on energy infrastructure
outlets.summary: War nearing completion per Trump. IDF eliminated IRGC commanders. Bridges and railways struck.

outlets.name: The Federalist
outlets.headline: Iranian Rescue Mission Underscores Hegseth's Predecessors' Incompetence
outlets.summary: Defense of Hegseth amid Democrat impeachment push. Credits operational improvements.

outlets.name: Al Jazeera
outlets.headline: Iran war: What is happening on day 39 of US-Israeli attacks?
outlets.summary: Comprehensive Day 39 coverage: Kharg Island, bridges, deadline, human chains, ceasefire rejection.

outlets.name: Euronews
outlets.headline: Iran claims bridges and railways damaged in strikes as Tehran faces ultimatum
outlets.summary: Infrastructure destruction campaign intensifies. Train service disrupted across Iran.

outlets.name: Haaretz
outlets.headline: Under Netanyahu and His Government, Passover Has Become a Festival of Emergency
outlets.summary: Editorial criticizes Netanyahu government. Passover celebrated under wartime restrictions.

outlets.name: Times of Israel
outlets.headline: Netanyahu: We will keep striking Iran as I promised — Passover address
outlets.summary: Netanyahu defiant Passover speech. 'Ten Plagues' comparison. 70% of Iran steel destroyed.

outlets.name: PressTV
outlets.headline: Iran blasts EU hypocrisy over Strait of Hormuz international law claims
outlets.summary: Iran rejects EU Kallas claims on Hormuz. Demands end to war, not temporary ceasefire.

outlets.name: PressTV
outlets.headline: IRGC Navy: Strait of Hormuz will never return to previous status
outlets.summary: IRGC vows permanent change to Hormuz. Threatens to deprive US/allies of oil for years.
